name: Yoichi Tanaka
description: Is Ferrari back or is it another Ferrari cycle? I honestly don't know, I only know that McLaren will be champion, Piastri and Lando will fight until the last race but I will be rooting for Piastri because he seems to have more of a champion's spirit than Lando, Piastri really fights for what he does, he gives everything for it while Lando doesn't seem to have the same spirit.
creator: VERSTAPPEN
